d_phrase: Response-code replacement on basic->route makes basic's other downstream (price-service) idle because basic stops calling it; price's metrics appear frozen.
rationale: fault on A→B edge; endpoints have symmetric/inconclusive signatures

d_phrase: DEFERRED: dataset labeling mismatch; DB meta says ts-config-service, datapack name says ts-food-service-container-kill. Not a genuine agent error.
rationale: dataset or labeling anomaly (non-agent error)

d_phrase: Bandwidth limit on route-plan->travel makes travel2 (near-twin of travel, co-downstream of route-plan) appear in the symmetric position.
rationale: named sibling competes with GT for attention

d_phrase: Response-body replacement on seat->order-other amplifies rabbitmq noise through order-other's retry cascade; order-service is a near-twin of order-other.
rationale: named sibling competes with GT for attention

d_phrase: Container-kill on travel-plan produces a restart window where its outgoing calls to basic-service fail.
rationale: GT node emits no anchor signal (missing spans / Unset / zero log-errors)
